auth_gate.description: Login or human-verification surface before Flow becomes usable.

workspace_shell.description: Primary Flow shell that confirms the scene workspace is open.

scene_prompt_input.description: Prompt editor for single-scene or batched scene generation requests.

batch_submit_button.description: Submission trigger for scene or batch generation.

render_ready_badge.description: Completion indicator for generated visuals before download.

download_button.description: Completed-output download action for image or clip exports.
